items.title: Braden Smith taking Kam Jones roster spot is key given that Indiana doesn't have many free agent spots. Could be needed with Tyrese Haliburton coming back from injury and TJ McConnell turning 34 next season.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: Braden Smith taking Kam Jones roster spot is key given that Indiana doesn't have many free agent spots. Could be needed with Tyrese Haliburton coming back from injury and TJ McConnell turning 34 next season.

items.title: Braden Smith is basically a better-shooting, worse-defending T.J. McConnell. So, it makes perfect sense that he lands with Indiana!
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Braden Smith is basically a better-shooting, worse-defending T.J. McConnell. So, it makes perfect sense that he lands with Indiana!

I love Smith and think he'll be a high-end backup PG for years in the NBA. He's also an outstanding passer. Pacers teammates will love him for that!

items.title: T.J. McConnell has been through a sub-20 win season before. It launched his career as a then-youngster. A 19-63 year can have the same effect for McConnell, but he needs to take a much different lesson: www.circlecityspin.com/debrief-t-j-...
